seller.broadcastMethodGuide: Select a broadcast method and start streaming.

seller.usagePreviewLink: Open the live preview link in a new tab to check in real-time

seller.liveOnlyPriceDesc: This price is shown only during live broadcast
seller.addDetailImageGuide: Click the "+ Add Image" button above to add images
seller.detailImageTip: Tip: You can copy image URLs from free image sites like Unsplash, Pexels, etc.
seller.selectLiveStreamDesc: Select if this product will be sold in a specific live stream
seller.productActivateDesc: When checked, the product is visible to customers
seller.productNameRequired: Product name, price, and stock are required.
seller.inactiveProductHidden: Inactive products are hidden from customers.
seller.editProductDesc: Edit product information and save changes.
seller.liveOnlyProductDesc: Limited product sold only during live streaming
seller.featuredProductDesc: General product displayed in the "Ur Special" section on the main page
seller.selectCategoryDesc: Select the category for this product
seller.newProductDesc: Register a new product and connect it to a live stream.
seller.productImageOptionalDesc: A default image will be shown if no image is uploaded.
seller.liveOnlyProductNote: This is a limited product sold only during live streaming.
seller.featuredOnlyAdmin: "Ur Special" products can only be registered from the admin dashboard.
seller.productCreateAfterEdit: You can edit the product anytime after registration.
seller.liveStreamLaterLink: You can link to a live stream later.
seller.youtubeAccountNeededDesc: Connect your YouTube account to start live broadcasting. You only need to authenticate once.
seller.persistentRtmpDesc: Enter once in OBS/Prism and it connects automatically every time
seller.persistentKeyNote: This key is permanent. No need to re-enter for each broadcast.
seller.selectMethodAndStart: Select a method and start broadcasting
seller.browserDirectDesc: Broadcast directly with your webcam. The simplest method.
seller.obsRtmpAlreadySet: If RTMP key is already set in OBS, just click Start Broadcasting in OBS. Live will start automatically.
seller.multiPlatformObs: Install the obs-multi-rtmp plugin (free) to simulcast to multiple platforms.
seller.addPlatformRtmp: Get RTMP URL + key from each platform's dashboard and add to OBS.
seller.obsGuidePasteKeys: Paste the server URL and stream key below
seller.obsGuideNextTime: Next time, just click Start Broadcasting in OBS!
seller.subtitleOverlayFreeSetup: Freely configure captions, logos, overlays, and more.
seller.prismRtmpAlreadySet: If RTMP key is already set in Prism, just start broadcasting in Prism. Live will start automatically.
seller.prismMultiDesc: Connect platform accounts in Prism app settings for simulcast.
seller.prismAddPlatform: Prism App → Settings → Add Platform to connect accounts or add external RTMP
seller.prismMobileDesc: Broadcast easily from your smartphone. Supports overlay, decoration, and simulcast.
seller.prismFirstSetup: Scan QR code or copy RTMP info below
seller.prismNextTime: Next time, just start broadcasting in Prism!
seller.prismMultiExternal: Simulcast via account linking or external RTMP in the Prism app.
seller.persistentKeyShort: This key is permanent. No need to re-enter once set.
seller.youtubeAuthRequired: YouTube integration required. Please connect your YouTube account first.
seller.youtubeApiNotConfigured: YouTube API is not configured. Please contact the administrator.
seller.enterValidNumber: Enter a valid number (0 or above)
seller.prismAdvantage: Works on smartphone, simulcast, built-in captions/decorations, completely free
seller.youtubeStudioNoSoftwareNote: Broadcast with just a webcam, no software installation needed
seller.startFromTab: Start a new live from the "Start Broadcast" tab
seller.broadcastTitlePlaceholderAlt: e.g., New Product Flash Sale Live!
seller.requestMemoPlaceholder: Enter your sales plan, desired quantity, etc.
seller.profitExplain: Set a selling price higher than the supply price to earn the difference as profit.
seller.sampleRequestSuccess: Sample request submitted. You can register the product after admin approval.
seller.productRegisteredSuccess: Product registered! Start selling on your live stream.
seller.descPlaceholder: Enter a description for your live stream...
seller.scheduledTimeHint: Leave empty to start live immediately
seller.youtubeAutoCreated: YouTube Live created! Copy the stream key and set it up in OBS.
seller.selectProductsForStream: Select products to sell in this live (optional)
seller.obsStep3: Server: Copy and paste the Stream URL above
seller.obsStep4: Stream Key: Copy and paste the Stream Key above
seller.prismStep3: Stream Key: Paste the Stream Key above
seller.prismBenefits: Prism benefits: Works on smartphone, YouTube + TikTok + Facebook simulcast, built-in overlays/captions, completely free
seller.autoDetectHint: Just paste the URL and it will be automatically detected
seller.youtubeAutoNote: To use YouTube auto create, the admin must set up YouTube API OAuth Token.
seller.youtubeAutoDesc: Once configured, YouTube Live will be created automatically and a stream key for OBS streaming will be issued.
seller.confirmDeleteStream: Are you sure you want to delete this stream?
seller.businessInfoDesc: Register your business info for tax invoice issuance. Available after admin approval.
seller.verificationPendingDesc: Admin is reviewing your business info. Takes 1-2 business days.
seller.businessNumberHint: Enter numbers only, hyphens added automatically.
seller.phoneNumberHint: Enter numbers only, hyphens added automatically.
seller.businessInfoSaved: Business info saved. Please wait for admin approval.
seller.requestInfoEditNote: Admin re-approval is required for edits.
seller.infoNotice1: Business info is used for tax invoice issuance.
seller.infoNotice2: If you need to edit after approval, use the "Request Info Edit" button. Admin re-approval is required.
seller.infoNotice3: False information may result in service restrictions.
seller.infoNotice4: Please use the "Search Address" button to enter the address accurately.
seller.addressSearchLoading: Loading address search. Please try again shortly.
seller.brandMessageDesc: Send marketing messages to live followers - 25 won/msg
seller.orderReceivedDesc: Auto send (Platform managed, no credit deduction)
seller.deliveryStartedDesc: Auto send (Platform managed, no credit deduction)
seller.liveBefore10minDesc: Send brand message to followers before live starts
seller.orderCancelledDesc: Auto send (Platform managed, no credit deduction)
seller.kakaoTemplateNote: Auto sending begins after Kakao template review. No messages sent if credits are 0.
seller.paymentSettingError: Unable to load payment settings. Please try again later.
seller.shortsRegisterEasy: Easily register with YouTube Shorts URL
seller.subscriberGrowthDesc:
You need 1,000+ subscribers for YouTube Live.
Select a package and pay, and our admin will process it after review.
seller.adminReviewNotice: Processing will begin after admin review.
seller.kakaoInquiryDesc: KakaoTalk open chat link for customer inquiries
seller.externalTradeWarningDesc: Transactions outside the platform are prohibited. The platform is not responsible for fraud. Report suspicious transactions to customer center (0507-0177-0432) immediately.
seller.newPasswordMin8: New password must be at least 8 characters
seller.changesSaveNotice: Changes will be reflected on your public page immediately after saving
seller.youtubeEmailLabel: Google account email for YouTube Live * (Required)
seller.youtubeEmailDesc: Enter the Google account (@gmail.com) to connect with YouTube Live.
seller.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters
seller.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
seller.invalidYoutubeEmail: Please enter a valid Google account email for YouTube Live
seller.usernameMin3: Username must be at least 3 characters
seller.registerSuccessMsg:
Registration complete!
You can log in after admin approval.
seller.registrationNote: Admin approval is required after registration. Approval may take 1-2 days.
seller.loginSubtitle: Log in with your seller account
seller.loginErrorDefault: Please check your email or password.
seller.noSellerAccount: Don't have a seller account yet?
seller.liveCommerceDesc:
Manage everything from products to settlements
in one place with Ur Seller Dashboard.
seller.realtimeSalesDesc: Check live orders and sales during broadcast
seller.integratedOrderDesc: From order processing to delivery tracking at a glance
seller.settlementAutomationDesc: Automatic commission calculation and settlement processing
seller.returnExchangeValue: Within 7 days (customer pays return shipping for change of mind)
seller.subscriberGrowthAfterReview: Subscriber growth will begin after admin review.
seller.paymentProcessingError: An error occurred while processing payment.
seller.confirmDeleteProduct: Are you sure you want to delete this product? This cannot be undone.
seller.commissionInfoDesc:
A 15% platform commission is deducted from donation settlements.
e.g., For 1,000 deal donation, actual settlement is ₩850.
seller.bankAccountPlaceholder:
Enter bank name, account number, and account holder
e.g., Kakao Bank 3333-01-1234567 John Doe
seller.settlementGuide1: Settlements are based on sales from the 1st to the last day of each month.
seller.settlementGuide2: Settlement requests can be made from the 1st of the following month.
seller.settlementGuide3: Settlement = Total Sales - Commission (seller-specific rate applied)
seller.settlementGuide4: Payment is made within 3-5 business days after admin approval.
seller.settlementGuide5: Settlement reports can be downloaded after approval.
seller.noBarcodeDetector: This browser does not support automatic barcode detection. Please check the barcode with the camera and enter it manually below.
seller.barcodeAutoDetect: Point the barcode at the camera. It will be detected automatically.
